title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
The contents of this Website is for general information. Every effort has been made to ensure that figures are correct. Information in some sections of this Website has been obtained/compiled from sources which are considered reliable. Any one using the information shall be doing so on his own judgement. IDBI Bank does not accept any responsibility for the consequences arising on account of relying on the information provided herein.
